text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer. I had a feeling I'd be seeing you.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
A little while ago, I began to feel a familiar and
refreshing breeze blowing past.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
It is also... a very pleasant breeze. I almost wish I
could simply stand here and enjoy it in silence...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Heh, but then I wouldn't be able to train, would I?
Take my musings as no more than whispers on the
wind.
